title: muhlenbergia minutissima
intro: Muhlenbergia minutissima, also known as the Least Muhly, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia minutissima are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it's essential to consult with a qualified healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
